# quadMin

**Instance Property**

The corner of the rectangle with the lowest coordinate values (in most coordinate systems, the lower-left corner).

## Declaration

```swift
var quadMin: vector_float2
```

## Instance Properties

- **quadMax**: The corner of the rectangle with the highest coordinate values (in most coordinate systems, the upper-right corner).

items.description: The corner of the rectangle with the highest coordinate values (in most coordinate systems, the upper-right corner).
